name: Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and thinly slice the apples. Toss with lemon juice and zest.
2. Mix brown sugar, flour, and spices (cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, ginger). Toss with apple slices to coat.
3. Roll half of the dough into a round and fit into a 9-inch pie pan. Fill shell with apple mixture.
4. Dot the top with butter pieces.
5. Roll remaining dough into a round large enough to cover the apples. Place carefully over the filling and crimp edges of crusts together.
6. Make slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
7. Mix teaspoon sugar with dash of cinnamon. Brush milk mixture over the top crust and sprinkle lightly with cinnamon-cinnamon sugar blend.
8. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 375°F and bake an additional 20-30 minutes, until golden brown.
